name: Tina Brown
description: British-American journalist, talk-show host, and author
abstract: Christina Hambley Brown, Lady Evans (born 21 November 1953), is a British and American journalist, magazine editor, columnist, broadcaster, and author. She is the former editor in chief of Tatler (1979–1982), Vanity Fair (1984–1992), The New Yorker (1992–1998), and the founding editor in chief of The Daily Beast (2008–2013).

concerts.label: The Time of His Time - A Celebration of Norman Mailer
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Hentoff Nat
about_quotes.evidence: when Tina Brown came in and she certainly changed the culture of the New Yorker... I got a note from her managing editor telling me I had retired
